title: BlockPartyMod
description: Automatically loads an existing resource pack on blockparty servers
body:
If the player goes to a server that fulfills one of the following criteria, an attempt is made to load a **previously installed resource pack** with the name `BlockParty.zip`. It is unloaded again when the player leaves the server. You can use [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockparty).

Criteria (case insensitive):
- server brand contains `block` & `party`
- scoreboard title contains `block` & `party`
